sourceMovie.title: Worldbreaker
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Worldbreaker (2025) stuck because it commits to its science fiction premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Brad Anderson's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The science fiction and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Underwater
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Worldbreaker clicked for you, Underwater (2020) is a strong next stop: both trade in science fiction and action, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Worldbreaker?
faq.answer: Try Underwater, The Girl with All the Gifts, Deep Rising—each shares DNA with Worldbreaker while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Worldbreaker?
faq.answer: Worldbreaker (2025) is best described as Science Fiction, Action, Horror. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Worldbreaker worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this science fiction lane.
